title: AI-Powered SDLC Factory — Platform Architecture
subtitle: 3 development tracks (Cloud/Web, SAP, Salesforce) · Shared Factory workflow · Same gates, knowledge, and quality across all tracks
strategyNote: Factory principle: stages IDEA through DEPLOY are shared. Only BUILD + unit TEST diverge per track. Everything routes through the AI Gateway and Knowledge Hub.

layers.name: UPM AI CoE Control Plane
layers.description: Centralized governance, routing, and policy enforcement

components.name: AI Gateway
components.detail: Azure API Management — centralized LLM routing, rate limiting, cost attribution per track

components.name: Responsible AI Policies
components.detail: Content safety filters, PII detection, output audit logging

components.name: Agent Registry
components.detail: A2A agent cards — discovery, versioning, capability metadata for all Factory agents

components.name: Gate Approvals (G1–G4)
components.detail: Human-in-the-loop sign-off gates — same gates for all 3 tracks

layers.name: Factory Orchestration Layer
layers.description: MS Agent Framework coordinates Factory workflow stages and cross-track handoffs

components.name: Coordinator Agent
components.detail: Routes requests through Factory stages, manages multi-step workflows across tracks

components.name: MS Agent Framework
components.detail: Agent lifecycle, A2A communication protocol, state management

components.name: Azure Service Bus
components.detail: Async event routing between Factory stages, dead-letter handling

components.name: Durable Functions
components.detail: Long-wait orchestrations (HITL gates, batch processing, cross-track sync)

layers.name: Factory Workflow Stages
layers.description: 7 stages — shared across all tracks except BUILD code generation

layers.name: BUILD Stage — 3 Development Tracks
layers.description: Same Factory workflow, different code generation tools per track

tools.name: CodeRabbit
tools.detail: AI-powered PR review on every commit

tools.name: SAP Joule + Build Code
tools.detail: ABAP Cloud, RAP, CDS views, Fiori Elements

tools.name: Joule Studio Code Review
tools.detail: Custom review skills with UPM ABAP standards

tools.name: ATC Compliance Scan
tools.detail: Clean core, deprecated API detection, migration readiness

tools.name: Fiori Playwright Config
tools.detail: Page objects + OData mocking for Fiori E2E

tools.name: ApexGuru Code Review
tools.detail: Performance analysis, anti-pattern detection, governor limits

tools.name: DevOps Center
tools.detail: Visual pipelines, GitHub integration, release management

tools.name: Apex + LWC Test Config
tools.detail: 75% coverage, Jest for LWC, Playwright for Lightning

layers.name: Knowledge Hub (Shared RAG Backbone)
layers.description: Central brain of the Factory — write once, read by all stages and tracks

components.name: Azure AI Search
components.detail: Vector store — Confluence, SharePoint, Solman, architecture catalog, project history, SAP custom code catalog + SAP Notes, SF org metadata + Apex docs

components.name: Redis Cache
components.detail: Hot-path caching — 30–50% hit rate for repeated queries across tracks

components.name: Blob Storage
components.detail: Source documents, embeddings, versioned snapshots, SAP/SF documentation

components.name: Knowledge Curator
components.detail: Freshness scoring, gap detection, auto-update from LEARN stage feedback

layers.dataFlow: All stages READ → Cache → miss → AI Search · LEARN stage WRITE → Service Bus → Ingest

layers.name: Test Backbone (Playwright + AI)
layers.description: Universal test execution — SAP Fiori, SF Lightning, and Cloud apps are all web-based

components.name: Playwright E2E Framework
components.detail: Cross-browser, cross-track — one framework tests Fiori, Lightning, and Cloud UIs

components.name: AI Test Generation Agent
components.detail: Reads acceptance criteria → generates Playwright scripts for any web UI

components.name: Quality Spec Agent
components.detail: TDD contract generation from approved specs, dual-phase validation

components.name: Test Report & Dashboards
components.detail: Coverage, defect severity, release readiness — aggregated across all 3 tracks

layers.name: Integration Layer
layers.description: Shared MCP connector library — built once, used by all Factory stages and tracks

tiers.label: Platform Bridges (governed via A2A Governance Bridges)

systems.name: SAP Joule
systems.usedBy: BUILD (SAP), TEST (SAP) — via A2A Governance Bridge + Integration Suite MCP Gateway

systems.name: SF Agentforce
systems.usedBy: BUILD (SF), TEST (SF) — via A2A Governance Bridge + Agentforce MCP Client

layers.name: Observability & Audit
layers.description: Full OpenTelemetry trace pipeline — cost attribution per track, compliance audit

components.name: OpenTelemetry SDK
components.detail: Structured traces from every Factory agent invocation, tagged by track

components.name: Azure Monitor
components.detail: Centralized log aggregation, alerting, per-track dashboards

components.name: Application Insights
components.detail: Performance tracking, dependency mapping, anomaly detection

components.name: Factory Dashboards
components.detail: Cost per stage, token usage per track, quality scores, SLA compliance

layers.name: Infrastructure (Azure)
layers.description: Terraform IaC — repeatable, auditable, Azure DevOps CI/CD for all 3 tracks

components.name: Terraform IaC
components.detail: All infra as code — Container Apps, AI Search, Functions, Service Bus

components.name: Key Vault
components.detail: Secrets, certificates, API keys — Managed Identity access only

components.name: Entra ID
components.detail: Role-based access per track, Managed Identity for service-to-service auth

components.name: VNet + Private Endpoints
components.detail: Network isolation, no public endpoints for backend services

guardrails: No human sign-off = no publish / merge / deploy (any track)
All AI output logged via OpenTelemetry — tagged by track and stage
Same quality gates (G1–G4) for Cloud, SAP, and Salesforce
LLM access only through AI Gateway (no direct calls from any track)
Playwright E2E for all web UIs (Fiori, Lightning, Cloud apps)
SAP Joule and SF Agentforce via A2A Bridge — governed, not bypassed
New agents require AI CoE Architecture Review before production
Knowledge Hub is single source of truth — all tracks read and write
